notes: These candidates are for offline benchmarking only. Do not bake any model into the capsule until it passes latency and trigger-specific accuracy gates.
The original requested Moondream 0.5B INT8 filename was not present in the current verified ggml-org GGUF repo; this manifest uses the current llama.cpp-compatible Moondream2 GGUF release.
The official SmolVLM-256M GGUF repo currently exposes Q8_0 plus mmproj. The Q4_K_M file is community-only and kept as an alternate.
SmolVLM2-500M is included as the next small CPU candidate because its current GGUF card documents llama.cpp support, Q8_0 model size around 437 MB, and a separate f16 vision projector around 199 MB.

moondream2-20250414-f16.label: Moondream2 20250414 F16
moondream2-20250414-f16.expected_strength: fast spatial perception and object grounding

qwen2-vl-2b-q4-k-m.label: Qwen2-VL 2B Instruct Q4_K_M
qwen2-vl-2b-q4-k-m.expected_strength: strict JSON adherence and better semantic labels

smolvlm-256m-q8-official.label: SmolVLM 256M Instruct Q8_0
smolvlm-256m-q8-official.expected_strength: smallest official multimodal footprint with projector

smolvlm-256m-q4-k-m-community.label: SmolVLM 256M Instruct Q4_K_M community alternate
smolvlm-256m-q4-k-m-community.expected_strength: tiny quantized fallback; verify multimodal projector compatibility before capsule use

smolvlm2-500m-q8-official.label: SmolVLM2 500M Video Instruct Q8_0
smolvlm2-500m-q8-official.expected_strength: small CPU-friendly upgrade over SmolVLM 256M; image captioning and VQA with llama.cpp support
